payload.answer: Rejected: no durable memory was committed because the proposed output was invalid or unsafe. A stronger model escalation or safe rejection is appropriate; in this evaluation response, safe rejection was selected.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an invalid schema or unsafe proposal from a cheap model and does not provide any durable user memory to commit.

details: Invalid or unsafe proposal was not persisted as memory.
Ambiguity preserved; no unsupported facts were inferred.

repair_options: Escalate the invalid or unsafe proposal to a stronger model for validation and repair.
Reject the proposal without committing memory.
Request a schema-valid, safety-checked replacement before considering any memory write.
